title: Text adapting to Themes Inside of Emails & Activities
excerpt: When using different themes the text inside of emails & activities section does not adjust to the theme and uses the original background, font, or color of the text. I am not sure how this would look to change, but it wo…

posts.author: DerrealBonDoodle (Dominic Valencia)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using different themes the text inside of emails & activities section does not adjust to the theme and uses the original background, font, or color of the text. I am not sure how this would look to change, but it would definitely be helpful of it was at least looked into
